rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow customers to create an account by filling in required details.
The system shall enable customers to place orders for garments once they are registered.
The system shall send out sample materials if a customer needs them after placing an order.
The system shall review the availability of raw materials for orders that require stock checking.
The system shall purchase raw materials if they are not available after stock checking.
The system shall process raw materials if they are already available.
The system shall begin garment production once raw materials are ready, either through purchasing or processing.
The system shall conduct a defect check on the produced garments.
The system shall deliver the finished garments to the customer if all checks pass.
The system shall complete billing and payment processes after delivering the garments.
The system shall generate a report along with feedback at the end of the process.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system allows customers to create an account by filling in required details.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: A customer starts by creating an account by filling in the required details.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Once registered, the system enables customers to place orders for garments.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Once the registration is complete, they can place an order for garments.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If a sample is needed after placing an order, the system sends out sample materials.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If a sample is required, sample materials are sent out.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: For orders where stock checking is necessary, the system reviews the availability of raw materials.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After placing the order, there are two possibilities. Either a sample is needed, or the available stock is checked.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If raw materials are not available after stock checking, the system purchases them.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Based on that, if the materials are not available, they are purchased.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If raw materials are already available, the system processes them.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the materials are already available, they are processed.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Once raw materials are ready (either through purchasing or processing), garment production begins.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Once the raw materials are ready, either through purchasing or processing, garment production begins.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: After garments are produced, they undergo a defect check.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After the garments are produced, they are checked for any defects.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If all checks pass, the system delivers the finished garments to the customer.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Once everything is cleared, the finished garments are delivered to the customer.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system completes billing and payment processes after delivery.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After delivery, billing is completed, and the payment is made.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Finally, the system generates a report along with feedback.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Finally, a report is generated along with feedback, and the process comes to an end.
